query:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN startTime = 0 OR startTime IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_or_null_startTime,
  SUM(CASE WHEN startTime > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS real_startTime,
  MIN(CASE WHEN startTime > 0 THEN FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000) END) AS earliest_real,
  MAX(CASE WHEN startTime > 0 THEN FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000) END) AS latest_real
FROM scheduleBlocks;

SELECT id, planId, title, status,
       FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000) AS startUtc,
       durationMin
FROM scheduleBlocks
WHERE startTime > 0
ORDER BY startTime DESC
LIMIT 15;
